# Requirements

## Summary

Fixture requirements.

## Scope

Core suite generation.

## Users and Scenarios

Planning team reviews a draft.

## Requirements

| Requirement ID | Requirement | Priority | Source | Assumption |
|----------------|-------------|----------|--------|------------|
| REQ-01 | Generate the core suite. | Must | Planning brief | No |

## Acceptance Criteria

| Requirement ID | Acceptance Criteria | Source | Assumption |
|----------------|---------------------|--------|------------|
| REQ-01 | Given aligned context, when drafts are generated, then four core files are saved. | Planning brief | No |

## Negative and Edge Cases

Missing context returns to intake.

## Dependencies

Quality review expects the same file set.

## Risks

Legacy files can reappear.

## Assumptions

Standard mode only.

## Evidence and Sources

Planning brief.

## Open Questions

No open question in fixture.

## Next Actions

Validate fixture.
